title: Trip Restaurants Dataset
description: A trip's restaurant data: a pool of restaurants tagged by price tier ($$ Refined / $$$ Elevated / $$$$ Signature), plus a list of dining nights. The user freely picks any pool restaurant for any night — nothing is pre-assigned.

party.description: Default party config used when deep-linking to OpenTable/Resy.

defaultTime.description: Default dinner time, e.g. '19:00' or '7:00 PM'.

dietary.description: Free-text dietary notes the traveler may want to reference when calling.

tiers.description: Tier definitions. Keys are the tier ids; order in the object is the display order (low → high).

restaurants.description: Deduped pool of every restaurant in the lineup. Each entry has a tier ('refined'|'elevated'|'signature') and can be picked for any number of nights.

nights.description: One entry per dining night in the trip, in chronological order. Nights expose the full restaurant pool; user picks per night.

supplementary.description: Pre-dinner drinks, removed/considered restaurants, and other non-pickable context.

blurb.description: Short description shown under the tier picker.

label.description: Human-readable night label (e.g. 'Fri Jun 5 — Canyon Road night').

time.description: Default dinner time for this night (e.g. '7:00 PM'). Overrides trip.party.defaultTime when present.

tier.description: Which price band this restaurant belongs to.

priceBand.description: Display string for this specific restaurant (e.g. '$90–130 pp').

openDays.description: Days the restaurant serves dinner. The verifier and UI use this to flag any night whose weekday isn't in this list.

closedDays.description: Legacy / alternate to openDays. If both are set, openDays wins.

notes.description: Short bullets shown in the modal (e.g. 'Patio under the chapel', 'Walk-in rooftop only').

verifiedAt.description: Last manual or automated QA verification date.

verificationStatus.description: Set by the verify script. 'candidate' = never verified yet; 'broken' = last verify failed.

platform.description: Which booking system the user should be sent to. 'phone' = call only. 'walkin' = no reservations at all.

url.description: Direct reservation URL when platform is online. Omitted for phone/walkin.

leadTime.description: Override of the tier-level lead time (e.g. '6+ weeks', 'same day').

note.description: Inline note shown next to the reserve button (e.g. 'Limited online June availability — call').

rooftopWalkInOnly.description: Special-case flag for places like Coyote Cafe where the rooftop is walk-in but the main floor is bookable.
